findings: Launcher ties agent lifecycle to tmux panes (no setsid/nohup/disown); tmux detach keeps agents running but tmux session loss stops fleet.
Teardown uses SIGTERM only for pidfile PIDs; no escalation if hung.

README claims --teardown “Kill agents, clean up” and tmux detach “agents keep running”; implementation mostly matches but manual tmux session termination bypasses pidfile cleanup and can leave stale pidfiles.
